repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3: PartialID seed is empty; pid_dose_response_shape only covers monotone-concave marginal dose-response shape closure

published_prior_art.cite: BaitairianSebastienJreichKatsahianGuilloux2025 + FanGuerreZhu2017 + FirpoRidder2019 give adjacent ingredients, not this IV-compatible rank-coupling LP

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dose_response_shape: no IV, no rank-slice target, no adjacent-dose copula tube

published_prior_art.cite: BaitairianSebastienJreichKatsahianGuilloux2025 and DalalTchetgenTchetgen2025 bound dosewise APO/dose-response curves, not a cross-dose rank-slice sign certificate

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dose_response_shape has a concavity phase-transition, but not a copula-radius IV/sensitivity phase transition

published_prior_art.cite: FirpoRidder2019 gives pointwise-vs-uniform sharpness warning; no copula-radius threshold for continuous-dose rank-slice slopes

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3 empty PartialID seed; no in-catalogue continuous-dose IV/sensitivity reduction

published_prior_art.cite: JessonDouglasManshausenSolalMeinshausenStierGalShalit2022, MarmarelisHaddadJessonJahanshadGalstyanVerSteeg2023, and BaitairianSebastienJreichKatsahianGuilloux2025 supply the known dosewise sensitivity envelope

soundness_flags.label: Locked parameters / Conjectures 1-2
soundness_flags.one_line: The common rank coordinate R_{a0,a1} is not mathematically pinned relative to U_{a0}, U_{a1}, and the copula C_{01,x}; outside exact comonotonicity, conditioning on R in tau is not determined by the stated copula tube.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1 / Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The dosewise bounds L_j(P,Gamma), U_j(P,Gamma) are load-bearing but never formally defined as APO bounds, rank-slice marginal bounds, or finite-bin bounds.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 2 / Corollary no-rank-no-sign
soundness_flags.one_line: The no-tube reduction compares a rank-slice conditional slope to an ordinary unconditional APO finite-difference interval; that reduction does not follow without an explicit rank-slice marginal construction.

soundness_flags.label: Locked parameters / Assumption IV margin
soundness_flags.one_line: The locked block says IV tolerance eta is part of the restriction, but §11 leaves its metric unresolved between moments, full conditional distributions, and Wasserstein distance.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define R_{a0,a1} explicitly, for example as U_{a0}, U_{a1}, a diagonal projection, or a finite latent bin variable, and restate the copula tube and theta using that convention.
Replace the no-tube sanity theorem with a rank-slice marginal version, or add assumptions under which unconditional APO endpoints are attainable inside the chosen rank slice.
Pin eta as a specific finite set of linear moment inequalities in the locked parameters so Theorem 1 is genuinely an LP projection.
Add a two-by-two numerical witness table for Conjecture 1 showing the dosewise interval straddles zero while the rank-coupled lower slope is positive.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal to pin the rank-coordinate and eta conventions, then repair Theorem 2 using rank-slice rather than unconditional APO bounds.
